title: Walera Routing Internals
description: Walera v1.1 routing-internals dashboard: index size by kind and per-subscriber queue depth distribution. A third panel (index-balance / per-shard-size coefficient of variation) is intentionally DEFERRED to v1.2 because the per-shard-size gauge is not currently exposed by internal/metrics/registry.go; the locked decision is to NOT emit a 'No data' stub panel.

panels.title: Routing index size by kind
panels.description: Subscribers registered per index_kind label (exact|wildcard). Label name is `index_kind` per internal/metrics/registry.go line 173 — NOT `kind`.

panels.title: Subscriber queue depth p99 by class
panels.description: p99 of per-subscriber buffered-channel len() by class label `type` (exact|wildcard). Saturation here is the leading indicator of slow_consumer drops on panel 7 of the overview dashboard.
